channel.title: New Religious Movements on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in New Religious Movements on Alien Truth Social

item.title: UFO religion
item.description:
A UFO religion, also known as a UFO cult, is a religion where belief in extraterrestrial entities and communication with them is central. These religions often posit that aliens are interested in humanity’s welfare and can help solve Earth’s problems with their advanced technology and spirituality. Their origins are linked to science fiction, ufology, and UFO sighting narratives. Some historians consider the Aetherius Society or the “I AM” Activity to be the first UFO religions.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UFO_religion

item.title: Pana Wave
item.description:
The Pana-Wave Laboratory is a Tokyo-based division of the Japanese new religious group Chino-Shoho, which was founded by Yuko Chino in 1977. Academics and observers have classified the organization as a contactee or UFO religion that incorporates a blend of Buddhist, Christian, and New Age doctrines. While membership estimates vary, the group has historically maintained a small following, ranging from several hundred to approximately 1,200 individuals.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pana_Wave
